steps: Go to https://dashboard.cohere.com and sign up or log in
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys'
A trial API key is automatically created for new accounts
To create an additional key, click 'New API key'
Enter a descriptive name for the key (e.g., 'production', 'development')
Copy the key — it is shown only once
notes: New accounts automatically receive a free trial API key with rate-limited access
Trial keys are limited to 20 API calls per minute and 1,000 calls per month
Production keys require a paid plan and are rate-limited at 10,000 calls per minute
The API key is sent as: Authorization: Bearer <key>
Key is shown only once at creation — store it securely

test_endpoint.description: List available models to verify the API key
